name: GIGABYTE Z890M AORUS ELITE WIFI7 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Supports DDR5-9200(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - DisplayPort 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 (Z890M AORUS ELITE WIFI7)
